title: Business Pack
description: Operations, finance and strategy for small businesses.

entries.content: Profit is opinion, cash is fact. Track runway, receivables and inventory tied-up cash. Many growing e-commerce brands die from cash starvation while 'profitable' on paper.
Price on value and positioning, not cost-plus. Test price points; premium pricing can increase perceived quality and margin. Bundles raise average order value.
Document repeatable processes so the business runs without you. What gets measured and documented can be delegated and scaled. Dashboards over gut feel.
One product line, one channel, one avatar until it works. Diversification before traction dilutes energy. Do fewer things, better, first.
